heading: Repayments to officers or employees
label: 7423 Repayments to officers or employees
notes: Amendments1976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary” in provisions preceding par. (1).Pub. L. 94–455
amendments: Amendments1976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary” in provisions preceding par. (1).Pub. L. 94–455

children.heading: Collections recovered
children.label: 1 Collections recovered
children.text: To any officer or employee of the United States the full amount of such sums of money as may be recovered against him in any court, for any internal revenue taxes collected by him, with the cost and expense of suit; also

children.heading: Damages and costs
children.label: 2 Damages and costs
children.text: All damages and costs recovered against any officer or employee of the United States in any suit brought against him by reason of anything done in the due performance of his official duty under this title.
